inputs.label: Apical Diameter (D0)
inputs.businessContext: Initial diameter at the apical region of the root canal, typically between 0.10-0.30 mm.

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial diameter at the apical region of the root canal, typically between 0.10-0.30 mm.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kök kanalının apikal bölgesindeki başlangıç çapı, genellikle 0.10-0.30 mm arası.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anfangsdurchmesser im apikalen Bereich des Wurzelkanals, typischerweise 0,10–0,30 mm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre initial dans la région apicale du canal radiculaire, généralement entre 0,10 et 0,30 mm.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro inicial en la región apical del conducto radicular, generalmente entre 0.10-0.30 mm.
businessContext_i18n.ar: القطر الأولي في المنطقة القمية لقناة الجذر، عادة بين 0.10-0.30 مم.

inputs.label: D16 Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of the instrument 16 mm from the tip (typically 1.0 mm for standard ISO instruments).

businessContext_i18n.en: Diameter of the instrument 16 mm behind (typically 1.0 mm for standard ISO instruments).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aletin 16 mm gerisindeki çapı (standart ISO aletler için tipik 1.0 mm).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchmesser des Instruments 16 mm hinter der Spitze (bei Standard-ISO-Instrumenten typisch 1,0 mm).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre de l'instrument à 16 mm en arrière (typiquement 1,0 mm pour les instruments ISO standard).
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro del instrumento a 16 mm de la punta (típicamente 1.0 mm para instrumentos ISO estándar).
businessContext_i18n.ar: قطر الأداة عند 16 مم خلفها (نموذجي 1.0 مم للأدوات القياسية ISO).

inputs.label: Working Length
inputs.businessContext: Working length from reference point to apex.

businessContext_i18n.en: Working length from reference point to apex.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Referans noktasından apikale kadar olan çalışma uzunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Arbeitslänge vom Referenzpunkt bis zum Apex.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur de travail du point de référence à l'apex.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud de trabajo desde el punto de referencia hasta el ápice.
businessContext_i18n.ar: طول العمل من النقطة المرجعية إلى القمة.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
